details.description: Riverside view in Brisbane’s CBD at golden hour. The foreground is the brown, tidal Brisbane River with gentle ripples. On the left riverbank is a promenade/boardwalk lined with large, modern high‑rise towers: mostly glass curtain‑wall office and residential buildings with balconies and stepped podiums above the water. The skyline shows several tall towers of varying heights and colors (blue‑green glazing, white concrete, and darker cladding). In the distance to the right is the Story Bridge, a large steel cantilever truss bridge spanning the river. Beneath and around the bridge on the far bank are low riverside buildings and wharf structures at the base of rocky green cliffs. The light is warm with scattered clouds and blue sky.

details.description: A riverside cityscape of Brisbane featuring a row of modern high-rise residential towers along the riverbank on the left, with glass and white facades and balconies. The Brisbane River occupies the foreground with calm water reflecting the buildings. In the distance to the right, the Story Bridge spans the river, displaying its distinctive steel cantilever lattice. The sky is bright with scattered clouds and warm afternoon light illuminating the urban waterfront.

details.description: A scenic view of the Brisbane River at dusk or late afternoon, looking downstream towards the iconic Story Bridge. The sky is a mix of blue and soft clouds illuminated by the setting sun. On the left, the riverbank (Petrie Bight) is lined with prominent high-rise architecture. The most immediate building on the left is Riparian Plaza, distinguished by its tall, dark glass façade and unique wavy, organic-shaped concrete podium at the base. Further along the river curve, a series of white residential towers are visible, including Admiralty Towers and Skyline Apartments. The Story Bridge, a large steel cantilever bridge, spans the river in the background, connecting the northern bank to Kangaroo Point. The calm water reflects the sky and the city skyline. A riverside boardwalk with railings is visible in the immediate foreground left.

details.description: A wide-angle, vertical shot of the Brisbane River at dusk or late afternoon. The iconic Story Bridge, a massive steel cantilever bridge, spans the river in the background. On the left bank, a row of modern high-rise residential and commercial buildings dominates the skyline, including the distinctive 443 Queen Street with its patterned podium and lush greenery. The water is calm, reflecting the soft light of the sky, which is filled with scattered white and golden-tinged clouds. The photographer appears to be standing on a riverside walkway, looking northeast towards the bridge.

details.description: Riverside cityscape in Brisbane, Australia. The photo looks along the Brisbane River from a riverwalk/jetty in the CBD. At left are tall modern residential and office towers lining the waterfront. To the right spans a large silver-grey steel cantilever truss bridge—the Story Bridge—crossing the river toward Kangaroo Point. A ferry and low riverbank structures sit beneath the bridge. The river fills the foreground under a partly cloudy, late-afternoon sky.

details.description: Riverside cityscape featuring the steel cantilever Story Bridge crossing the Brisbane River. In the foreground is the City Reach of the river with a riverwalk/promenade on the left bank. Beyond the water, refurbished low-rise wharf buildings sit against a cliff face (Howard Smith Wharves precinct) immediately before the bridge. To the left rises the Brisbane CBD skyline with modern glass-and-concrete residential and office towers; among them is a white tower with a small spire (Riparian Plaza) and other Eagle Street towers. Lighting suggests late afternoon/early evening with warm clouds and clear sky.

details.description: A late-afternoon city riverscape featuring a cluster of tall, modern high-rise residential towers aligned along the riverbank on the left, with a large steel truss bridge spanning the Brisbane River to the right. The bridge appears to be a cantilever-type structure, rising above the water and connecting distant parts of the city. The sky is partly cloudy with warm light reflecting off the glass façades and the water, creating gentle highlights and ripples. The overall scene is a contemporary urban waterfront.

details.description: A scenic view of the Brisbane River in Brisbane, Australia, captured during the late afternoon with warm sunlight illuminating the clouds. The composition is split between a dense cluster of high-rise residential skyscrapers on the left bank and the iconic steel cantilever Story Bridge spanning the river on the right. The river water is a characteristic murky brown, reflecting the sky. The skyline on the left features prominent buildings of the Admiralty Precinct, including the tall, dark-glass Skyline Apartments and the white, curved facade of Admiralty Towers II. The sky is blue with scattered, fluffy cumulus clouds.

details.description: A vertical shot of the Brisbane River at dusk, featuring the iconic Story Bridge in the background. On the left bank, several modern high-rise buildings dominate the skyline, including the distinctive Riparian Plaza with its wavy base and the tall Brisbane Skytower. The water is calm with slight ripples, reflecting the soft golden light of the setting sun. The sky is filled with scattered clouds tinged with pink and orange hues. The Story Bridge, a heritage-listed steel cantilever bridge, spans the river towards Kangaroo Point.
